There have been several wau-waus
among the old men and the leaders
OF the Joseph Indians and the chief
contention has been over the proposed

country.


Politics have cut considerable hg-
ure In the handling of this question.
Those Nex Perces who stood loyal to

mics In the Wallowa country. They
also have an idea that the removal of
the body at this time will give the
idaho Nex Perces strong claim on
